stockLayerVolatilityRating.label: Moderate / Stable
stockLayerVolatilityRating.explanation: Cisco is a large, mature technology company with lower expected volatility than high-growth AI or semiconductor names.

vulnerabilityMarkers.label: Medium
vulnerabilityMarkers.explanation: AI is more opportunity than existential threat for Cisco, but it could reshape networking, security and observability markets.

vulnerabilityMarkers.label: Medium
vulnerabilityMarkers.explanation: Cisco has global supply chain and enterprise exposure, but is less directly concentrated in Taiwan semiconductor risk than some peers.

vulnerabilityMarkers.label: Medium
vulnerabilityMarkers.explanation: Cisco is exposed to enterprise IT spending cycles, but its mature cash generation makes it less fragile than speculative growth stocks.

vulnerabilityMarkers.label: High
vulnerabilityMarkers.explanation: Cisco has historically used acquisitions heavily to expand into adjacent markets.
